description_long: This cabin features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is primarily constructed from light-colored wood, with a prominent white horizontal band wrapping around the upper section. A staircase leads to an elevated platform, which is bordered by a simple metal railing. The cabin sits on a wooden floor base, and a partial wall provides privacy or separation on the upper level. There are no visible windows or doors on the exterior, emphasizing the streamlined, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, minimalist wooden cabin with a flat roof, elevated platform, and staircase, featuring a white accent band and metal railing.
description_view_0: The front view shows the staircase leading up to the elevated platform, the white accent band, and the partial privacy wall.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the elongated shape of the cabin, the flat roof, and the absence of visible windows or doors.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the solid wooden back wall and the continuation of the white accent band, with no openings visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals the platform's depth, the metal railing, and the partial privacy wall extending above the platform.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with slight overhang, constructed from wood or composite panels
attribute_window_arrangement: No visible windows on any side; exterior surfaces are solid and uninterrupted
attribute_door_placement: No exterior doors are visible on any side of the cabin
